name: Jurassic Park
description: Steven Spielberg's dinosaur blockbuster franchise — Isla Nublar, DNA in amber, and 'clever girl.'

questions.q: Who directed the original 1993 Jurassic Park?

source.notes: Spielberg also directed The Lost World (1997).

questions.q: Jurassic Park is based on a 1990 techno-thriller by which novelist?

source.notes: Crichton also wrote the screenplay with David Koepp.

questions.q: What is the name of the fictional island where the original Jurassic Park is set?

source.notes: Isla Sorna appears in sequels.

questions.q: Which Central American country are the Jurassic Park islands located off the coast of?

source.notes: Filming was done in Hawaii though, mostly on Kauai.

questions.q: Which actor plays paleontologist Alan Grant in the original 1993 film?

source.notes: New Zealand actor Sam Neill.

questions.q: Who plays the charmingly twitchy chaos theorist Dr. Ian Malcolm?

source.notes: Reprised in The Lost World and Jurassic World: Dominion.

questions.q: What is the name of John Hammond's private catchphrase about his dinosaur park?

source.notes: Delivered by Richard Attenborough's Hammond.

questions.q: Who plays the park's visionary founder John Hammond?

source.notes: Attenborough's first on-screen role in 15 years.

questions.q: Who plays Dr. Ellie Sattler, the paleobotanist?

source.notes: Dern returned in Jurassic World: Dominion (2022).

questions.q: What source of DNA do Jurassic Park's scientists use to clone dinosaurs?

source.notes: Blood from mosquitoes preserved in amber.

questions.q: Which actor plays the greedy computer programmer Dennis Nedry?

source.notes: Knight is also Newman on Seinfeld.

questions.q: What shaving-cream brand appears as the cryogenic container Nedry uses to smuggle dinosaur embryos?

source.notes: Barbasol cameo is a famously product placed.

questions.q: Which small, intelligent dinosaurs — whom Alan Grant calls 'clever girl' — hunt in packs in Jurassic Park?

source.notes: Film raptors were actually more like Deinonychus size.

questions.q: The original Jurassic Park's iconic score was composed by whom?

source.notes: Williams also scored Indiana Jones, Star Wars, and Schindler's List.

questions.q: Which actor plays Muldoon, the park's game warden best known for 'Clever girl'?

source.notes: Peck delivers 'Clever girl' before being ambushed.

questions.q: Which actress plays the park's capable operations manager Claire Dearing in Jurassic World?

source.notes: Ron Howard's daughter.

questions.q: Who plays velociraptor trainer Owen Grady in Jurassic World?

source.notes: Pratt led the Jurassic World trilogy (2015, 2018, 2022).

questions.q: What is the hybrid dinosaur antagonist introduced in Jurassic World (2015)?

source.notes: Engineered in Henry Wu's lab.

questions.q: Who directed 2015's Jurassic World, the first in the modern trilogy?

source.notes: Trevorrow returned for Dominion (2022).

questions.q: Who directed 2018's sequel Fallen Kingdom?

source.notes: Bayona also directed The Impossible and Society of the Snow.

questions.q: Who directed Jurassic Park III (2001)?

source.notes: Johnston also directed Jumanji and Captain America: The First Avenger.

questions.q: In The Lost World: Jurassic Park (1997), the T-rex is brought to which major U.S. city in a dramatic climax?

source.notes: The T-rex rampages through San Diego.
